item.title: 快速指南，在 Linux 中为用户创建 ssh 密钥对 | Fast guide, creating a ssh key pair for the user in Linux
item.description:
聪明的少年

发表于 7 月 8 日

对于这个非常简短的教程，您需要在 Linux 上安装 ssh 客户端和服务器。 要在 Ubuntu 上安装：

$ sudo apt install openssh-client
$ sudo apt install openssh-server

在拱门上

入门

要创建密钥对，请运行以下命令：
$ ssh-keygen -o -a 100 -t ed25519 -f ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -C "{your_email}"

之后将出现一条消息，要求输入如下密码：
Enter passphrase (empty for no passphrase):

您只需按 Enter 或写下密码并确认即可。

要获取您的公钥，请输入：
$ cat ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub

现在，您可以复制您的公钥并在您想要的服务的 ssh 客户端上注册，例如 Github 或 Amazon。

所以你不必一直输入密码，你的机器需要有 ssh-agent 服务。 您可以使用以下命令检查是否正在运行：
$ eval(ssh-agent -s)
该命令将返回进程的代理 pid。

如果它正在运行，您可以将新密钥添加到代理，只需键入：
然后它只会询问您一次密码。

做得好！ 现在您是我们社会中可通过密码识别的公民。

塞巴斯蒂安·杜克 G - 6 月 28 日

一旦被暂停，cleverjunior 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，cleverjunior 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，cleverjunior 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 smartjunior 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 smartjunior：

使 smartjunior 的所有帖子变得不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

不标记 smartjunior 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Clever Júnior

Posted on Jul 8

For this very short tutorial, you need to have installed the ssh client and server on your linux. To install on Ubuntu:

$ sudo apt install openssh-client
$ sudo apt install openssh-server

On Arch

$ yay -S openssh or $ sudo pacman -S openssh

Getting Started

To create your key pair run this command:
$ ssh-keygen -o -a 100 -t ed25519 -f ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -C "{your_email}"

After this will appear a message to enter a passphrase like this:
Enter passphrase (empty for no passphrase):

You can just press Enter or write your passphrase and confirm.

To get your pub key type:
$ cat ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub

Now you can copy your pub key and register on the ssh client of the service you want, like Github or Amazon.

So you don't have to type the passphrase all the time, your machine needs to have the ssh-agent service. You check if is running with this command:
$ eval(ssh-agent -s)
The command will return the agent pid of the process.

If it is running, you can add your new key to the agent, just type:
$ ssh-add ~/ssh/id_ed25519.
Then it only will ask for your passphrase once.

Well done! Now you're a cryptographically identifiable citizen in our society.

Sebastián Duque G - Jun 28

Once suspended, cleverjunior will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, cleverjunior will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by cleverjunior will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If cleverjunior is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag cleverjunior:

Make all posts by cleverjunior less visible

cleverjunior consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging cleverjunior will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: cleverjunior
